idea-plugin.name: K Presentation Buddy
idea-plugin.description:
Automate your presentation demonstrations with K Presentation Buddy!

Create polished, repeatable code demonstrations for presentations, tutorials, and live coding sessions. Define your demo steps in a simple JSON file and let the plugin execute them automatically with realistic typing.

Key Features

  • Realistic Code Typing - Type code character-by-character with configurable delays
  • File Management - Create and open files automatically during your demo
  • IDE Commands - Execute any IDE action (format, refactor, run, etc.)
  • Terminal Integration - Run terminal commands with typing simulation
  • Project Navigation - Open folders and navigate your project structure
  • Pause Points - Control when to pause for explanation or interaction
  • Line-by-Line Control - Fine-grained control over chunked file typing

Perfect For

  • Conference presentations and live coding demos
  • Tutorial video recording
  • Coding bootcamp instruction
  • Product demonstrations
  • Code review sessions

How It Works

  1. Create a JSON file with your demo instructions
  2. Load the instructions via Tools → Presentation Buddy → Load Instructions File
  3. Press Ctrl+Alt+1 (or Cmd+Alt+1 on Mac) to start/pause your demo
  4. Watch as your code appears automatically with realistic timing!

Inspired by Presentation Buddy and adapted for IntelliJ-based IDEs.

See the GitHub repository for complete documentation and examples.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Support for typeText, typeTextFromFile, and typeChunksFromFile instructions
  • File creation and navigation
  • Terminal command execution with typing simulation
  • Configurable typing delays and pause points
  • IDE command execution support
  • Keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+Alt+1) for start/pause/resume

action.description: Start, resume, or pause the demo execution
